title: Bake│烘焙
description: Dough products need to be baked.│麵團製品需要經過烘烤。
body:
**⚠️ This data pack requires the server-side mod [Item Components](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-components).│該資料包需要伺服器端模組[物品組件](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-components)。 ⚠️**
# Introduce│介紹
**Dough products can be cooked in a Furnace, Smoker or Campfire.│使用熔爐、煙燻爐或營火即可烹飪麵團製品。**
## Nutritional value of uncooked dough products│未烤過的麵團製品的營養價值
- Uncooked Bread: 2 Hunger Value, 1 Saturation, 50% Hunger│未烤過的麵包：2飢餓值，1飽食度，50%飢餓
  - Get command: ```/loot give @s loot bake:uncooked_bread```│獲取指令：```/loot give @s loot bake:uncooked_bread```
- Uncooked Cookie: 1 Hunger Value, 0 Saturation, 30% Hunger, Smelting time halved│未烤過的麵包：1飢餓值，0飽食度，50%飢餓，熔煉時間減半
  - Get command: ```/loot give @s loot bake:uncooked_cookie```│獲取指令：```/loot give @s loot bake:uncooked_cookie```
- Uncooked Pumpkin Pie: 3 Hunger Value, 1.5 Saturation, 50% Hunger│未烤過的南瓜派：3飢餓值，1.5飽食度，50%飢餓
  - Get command: ```/loot give @s loot bake:uncooked_pumpkin_pie```│獲取指令：```/loot give @s loot bake:uncooked_pumpkin_pie```
# Precautions│注意事項
1. The item name and item description of "Uncooked Bread", "Uncooked Cookie" and "Uncooked Pumpkin Pie" only support three languages: ```zh_cn```,```zh_tw```,```en_us```. If you need it to support more languages, please let me know by reporting the issue.│"未烤過的麵包"、"未烤過的餅乾"和"未烤過的南瓜派"的物品名稱和物品描述只支援```zh_cn```,```zh_tw```,```en_us```三種語言，如果你需要其支援更多語言，請透過匯報問題讓我知道。
2. If you install the [Eating Animation](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/eating-animation-resource-pack), then regardless of whether you install the mod version or the data pack version, you will also need to install an additional resource pack file called "Bake_is_compatible_with_EA", and move it to the top of all resource packs.│如果你安裝了[食用動畫](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/eating-animation-resource-pack)，那麼不論你安裝的是模組版本還是資料包版本，你都需要安裝名為"Bake_is_compatible_with_EA"的附加資源包檔案，並將其的排序移動到所有資源包的最上方。
